messages.text: strong vibes cool, test me in person
you reject the message, not the thread
you wanna be annoyed so bad
you say that like it is new
you clap back like it’s a group chat
you downplay everything except your comebacks
you swear you’re done but reload anyway
you're brave i'll give you that
drinks thursday. i'm choosing the place
you're lowkey funny and that's annoying
